_comment: kuksa-bridge config for VM2 (Zonal) in relay-only mode.
Scope: the bridge acts as a stateless Zenoh relay between local ECUs
and the VM1 bridge. It forwards cabin signals without connecting to
any local Kuksa (which does not exist on VM2).
- all 3 cabin signals are BIDIRECTIONAL so the dashboard-driven
values sourced by hvac_ecu.py / seat_ecu.py on VM2 still reach
VM1, AND the EV Range Extender app on VM1 can push HVAC / Seat
setpoint changes back to VM2's bridge. The HVAC / Seat ECUs
subscribe to the bridge for those signals and (a) emit
an 'ACT' log line and (b) forward a key/value status pair to
the host dashboard for the on-screen indicator.
VM2 listens on tcp/0.0.0.0:7448 (local Zenoh peer for ECUs).
VM2 dials VM1 on tcp/192.168.100.10:7448 (VM1 bridge listener).

signals._role: VM2 relay: cabin (bidirectional - dashboard and EV-app writes flow both ways)
VM2 relay: cabin (bidirectional - dashboard and EV-app writes flow both ways)
